history.text: Emirate of Mount Lebanon ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Double Qaim-Maqamate of Mount Lebanon appears in Lebanon's historical record.
Mount Lebanon Mutasarrifate appears in Lebanon's historical record.
Greater Lebanon appears in Lebanon's historical record.
A constitution set out Lebanon's basic framework of government.
Lebanon declared independence, a decisive step toward modern statehood.
French mandate ended placed the territory under outside administration before modern independence.
Withdrawal of French forces changed control of the territory.

worthSeeing.title: Beirut:
worthSeeing.text: Resilient, cosmopolitan city known as the Paris of the Middle East, with incredible food and nightlife.

worthSeeing.title: Baalbek:
worthSeeing.text: Magnificent Roman temple complex among the largest and best preserved in the world.

worthSeeing.title: Jeita Grotto:
worthSeeing.text: Spectacular cave system with underground rivers and stalactite chambers.
